title: The Clients & The Servers [TCATS]
description: All of the mods in my two modpacks "The Clients" and "The Servers". Supports 1.21.8 (1.21.9 and 1.21.10 coming soon!) (I also added some extra mods that weren't in either one)
body:
# Heres what The Clients & The Servers does!
The Clients and Servers is a modpack that has the best client and server side mods, with features like more FPS, optimization, more configurable options, more biomes, more structures, a minimap, a better F3 menu, better looking clouds, shader suport, dynamic lighting, 3D skin layers, letting you see light levels, zooming, better building, more blocks, more enchants, and much more!
# My Links

[The Clients Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-clients)

[The Servers Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-servers)
